description: Dangerous DOM and JS sinks that pass strings to the HTML or JavaScript parsers. Flag any of these reachable from user input.

sinks.name: innerHTML / outerHTML assignment
sinks.recommendation: Use textContent for plain text; route HTML through DOMPurify with strict config

sinks.name: React dangerouslySetInnerHTML
sinks.recommendation: Sanitize via DOMPurify or a server-side allowlist before rendering

sinks.name: Script element src/text from string
sinks.recommendation: If you must, attach with element.src bound to a literal URL; never assign innerText/innerHTML from input

sinks.name: window.location assignment from input
sinks.recommendation: Validate URL scheme against allowlist before redirecting

sinks.name: target=_blank without rel=noopener
sinks.recommendation: Always add rel="noopener noreferrer" alongside target=_blank

sinks.name: postMessage without origin check
sinks.recommendation: Always validate event.origin against an allowlist inside the handler

sinks.name: localStorage / sessionStorage for tokens
sinks.recommendation: Store auth state in HttpOnly cookies instead
